summary: Tier-3 E2E lifecycle tests for Layer-3 parity primitives — 12 new tests in tests/e2e/parity-primitives-lifecycle.test.ts covering registry boot, rule contract surface, skill+hook end-to-end render, memory verify, migrator backfill, sentinel lifecycle. Plus migrator categorization tweak: 'refused to remediate' (memory rule) now recognized as a skip alongside 'user-edit-conflict' (skill rule).
